endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/achievements/reset
endpoints.description: Resets all achievements for the currently authenticated player for your application. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/achievements/resetAllForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets all draft achievements for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/achievements/resetMultipleForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets achievements with the given IDs for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft achievements may be reset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/achievements/{achievementId}/reset
endpoints.description: Resets the achievement with the given ID for the currently authenticated player. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/achievements/{achievementId}/resetForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets the achievement with the given ID for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft achievements can be reset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1management/applications/{applicationId}/players/hidden
endpoints.description: Get the list of players hidden from the given application. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/applications/{applicationId}/players/hidden/{playerId}
endpoints.description: Hide the given player's leaderboard scores from the given application. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid. Replace {{PLAYERID}} with a real playerid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /games/v1management/applications/{applicationId}/players/hidden/{playerId}
endpoints.description: Unhide the given player's leaderboard scores from the given application. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid. Replace {{PLAYERID}} with a real playerid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/events/reset
endpoints.description: Resets all player progress on all events for the currently authenticated player. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/events/resetAllForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets all draft events for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/events/resetMultipleForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets events with the given IDs for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft events may be reset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/events/{eventId}/reset
endpoints.description: Resets all player progress on the event with the given ID for the currently authenticated player. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EVENTID}} with a real eventid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/events/{eventId}/resetForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets the event with the given ID for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft events can be reset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EVENTID}} with a real eventid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}/scores/reset
endpoints.description: Resets scores for the leaderboard with the given ID for the currently authenticated player. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}/scores/resetForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets scores for the leaderboard with the given ID for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft leaderboards can be reset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/scores/reset
endpoints.description: Resets all scores for all leaderboards for the currently authenticated players. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/scores/resetAllForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets scores for all draft leaderboards for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1management/scores/resetMultipleForAllPlayers
endpoints.description: Resets scores for the leaderboards with the given IDs for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft leaderboards may be reset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.
